training.recommendation: Focus on a controlled easy run today, around 3-4 miles, keeping the pace comfortable. Prioritize knee-friendly surfaces and include mobility work for hips and ankles afterwards.
training.reasoning: With a current rebuilding phase, it's crucial to maintain consistency without stressing the knees. Energy levels are high, making this an ideal day for a manageable run to aid the marathon preparation.
training.caution: Avoid pushing the pace too hard to ensure knee durability is not compromised.
training.optional: Include core work like planks if time allows.
training.skip: Skip core work if energy drops or knees feel sensitive.

alternatives.recommendation: Count the surfing session as the main workout; perform 10 minutes of post-surf mobility.

readiness.note: Ready to engage in a controlled aerobic session.

runningStats.focus: Building consistency gently without stressing knees.

liftProgram.why: Supporting posterior chain strength and midday recovery.

movementMenu.recommendation: Quick dynamic stretches and ankle mobility.
Short easy run with post-run stretching.
Moderate run with focus on form and hip mobility post-run.
Longer easy run with comprehensive cooldown and stretching.
